display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a beloved German shepherd walk again. Meanwhile, Dr. Don has to act fast when a cat eats poison and a scared dog runs loose outside the clinic.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete is off to build his second Alaskan treehouse! He sets out to create an outside-in treehouse and heats things up by installing a sauna in the trees.

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: As police surround a flat where a gunman is thought to be hiding, PC Fletcher's firearms support dog, Patto, faces a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Otto and Eivin fight to douse a raging coal fire on Kilcher beach that threatens the homestead. Meanwhile, Atz Sr attempts an unconventional bear hunt.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bushcraft Chronicle
programme.desc: With exclusive interviews and insider facts, the Browns recall the most ingenious bush appliances made in Browntown, and discuss the creation of a bush bug zapper.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A couple dismiss a warning to leave their home as a kids' prank. But when Gloria wakes to see a cross painted on her forehead, they call in the paranormal team.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby Giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to raise another baby: Melman the Kangaroo.

programme.title: Guardians Of The Glades
programme.desc: To stop the pythons from establishing new breeding colonies, the team hunts in the Florida Keys. And, Dusty tries to recruit the next generation of snake hunters.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete is off to build his second Alaskan treehouse! He sets out to create an outside-in treehouse and heats things up by installing a sauna in the trees.

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: The team makes a dramatic rescue when a spaniel gets trapped underground. Plus, a challenging situation arises when a dog and her pups are attacked by bees.

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: It's a race against time as an AHS team battle to save a kitten trapped in a maze of underground pipes. A dog with a fatal injury is the centre of a shocking case.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Andy loves girlfriend Alyssa, but hates her 'demon cat', Tosh, who turned after he moved in with her. Eric and Kaotar's problem cat, Vincent, tries anything to escape.

programme.title: Bad Dog
programme.desc: A dog loves all things ice cream and another dog keeps getting his head stuck in things. Plus, a parrot has a habit of rapping and swearing.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: A company designing customisations for high-end and rare vehicles wants an exotic fish tank. They want a huge, three-sided build as their centrepiece.

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: In the town of Flagstaff, forest fires are threatening the local people and their pets. Members of the Arizona Humane Society risk their own lives to help out.

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: Field Operations Manager Racelle Carlson leads a team that's trying to rescue more than a dozen pigs that have been neglected, leaving them emaciated.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia Zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tania and Maria create a retirement centre for senior dogs at one of the warehouses. Meanwhile, Lizzy rescues a dog whose skin is in an awful condition.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jay has one lady in his life and that's his ferocious attack cat, Marley. Marley will tear apart anyone who crosses her path - including Jay.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson has his hands full with two cats; one who likes to bully and another who poops excessively. Plus, there's another who is doing its best to ruin a dream home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season and wardens investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, they swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff visits a free clinic and returns with a dog who was hit by a car. Plus, he helps a dog with a mysterious lump and Dr. Baier wants to keep a rescue puppy.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete creates an off-the-grid escape that's all about peace, love, and treehouses. Once built, the owner adds a massive hammock in the trees.

programme.title: Richard E. Grant's 7 Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Richard E Grant explores the evolutionary roots of Lust - the intense, out-of-control craving ... for sex. Animals feel lust too - otherwise species would die out.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: With predators closing in, Otto creates a calf caboose for his spring cattle drive at the bay. Atz Lee and Jane bring sustainable solar power to their remote cabin.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bushcraft Chronicle
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive interviews and insider facts, these are Browntown's most innovative bushcraft shelters. Plus, Matt races to build a lean-to structure to keep safe.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Laura is sceptical when her daughter describes a figure in the bathroom and her son sees a bloody man in the basement. Should she be taking their tales seriously.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A cat-obsessed woman gets a kitten as a gift, but is quickly disappointed when the cat terrorizes her other two felines; a couple living in harmony is disturbed by their newest addition's demonic ways.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: When Debbie returns home from a trip, she finds her house covered and smelling like cat pee from her boyfriend, Brian's cat Blinkie, who denies the problem; Krisi may have to choose between marriage to her boyfriend Jason and her cat Frankie.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Former reality star Peggy Tanous is struggling to keep the peace between her cat Shadow and her family. Meanwhile, a couple is desperate for Jackson to change the frisky behavior of their feline, Albert.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A photographer who lives and works out of his home is at risk of losing his business and his assistant because of his bloodthirsty cat; a fat feline's love for food is bound to be his greatest downfall.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A man's devilish cat, Darkness has made his girlfriend fear for her safety after moving in together; a couple's four felines have turned their brand-new home into a war zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to endure 21 days in the wreckage of an abandoned village in Botswana's Okavango Delta, where aggressive hippos have claimed the territory.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Shark attack fan survivalist teams up with an environmentalist military vet for a 21-day challenge in Zambia.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A wilderness EMT and a hard-headed homesteader try to survive in a coastal Colombian jungle; when their priorities clash, their partnership becomes volatile.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two women and two men face off in South Africa to see who can survive 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A wilderness EMT and a hard-headed homesteader try to survive in a coastal Colombian jungle; when their priorities clash, their partnership becomes volatile.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two women and two men face off in South Africa to see who can survive 21 days.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A photographer who lives and works out of his home is at risk of losing his business and his assistant because of his bloodthirsty cat; a fat feline's love for food is bound to be his greatest downfall.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A man's devilish cat, Darkness has made his girlfriend fear for her safety after moving in together; a couple's four felines have turned their brand-new home into a war zone.

programme.title: Too Cute!
programme.desc: One dozen goldendoodles take over a home and a pet pig's bed; a Westie chases after her wandering twin brother; Swiss mountain puppies find their stride.

programme.title: Too Cute!
programme.desc: Artistic Irish terriers meet their troublesome teen brother; eight corgis help out on the farm; an Akita puppy finds her place among her three tough brothers.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Outside Corpus Christi, Texas, Jeremy Sutcliffe is working in his garden when a rattlesnake bite puts him on the brink of death; while spearfishing in the Bahamas, Kent Bonde is blindsided by a bull shark that tears the calf muscle from his leg.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Jordan Carbery is investigating a noise outside his cabin and encounters a massive grizzly bear; Zanele Fox and her husband take a river tour when she is thrown from her raft and ravaged by a crocodile.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: On a family trip to Pattaya, Thailand, Helen Costigan attends an elephant show when one of the massive beasts turns deadly; golf ball recovery specialist Scott Lahodik is diving in a Florida lake when he's attacked by a vicious alligator.

programme.title: Swamp Wars
programme.desc: The Venom One team stages a rescue when deadly bees threaten an elderly living facility.

programme.title: Swamp Wars
programme.desc: Burmese pythons and venomous cottonmouths are turning up in unexpected places.

programme.title: Swamp Wars
programme.desc: Deadly snake in a mailbox; 12-foot python.

programme.title: Swamp Wars
programme.desc: A snake farm is taken hostage, and it is feared the snakes may be unleashed into the suburbs.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Hurricane Isaac batters New Orleans, flooding Villalobos' evacuation location and isolating Tia from the rest of the world.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia recalls dramatic rescues and heartwarming moments from the fourth season of the series; updates on featured dogs.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia and M2 take to the water to prepare a pit bull for her forever home; a new parolee comes to Villalobos from Boston, hoping stay on track so that he can make his teenage son proud; a stray dog is near death when Lizzy and Heidi find him.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: A Harley-loving adopter arrives; Mariah and Lizzy struggle to catch a stray pit in New Orleans East; when a litter of black pit-mix puppies are dropped off at the Sanctuary, Tia and M2 turn to social media to adopt them out.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia is called in to help rescue five injured dogs from a dog fighting situation; parolee Spencer gets out of jail and returns to Villalobos; Tia asks Spencer to help out with an adoption as a way to keep him on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes after Tia and M2 agree to take two malnourished hounds from a rural shelter; Mariah and Lizzy give two dogs a positive outcome while working through the global pandemic; M2 reveals a crucial life chapter.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When a government official is killed during a routine patrol, a sergeant stands accused of involuntary manslaughter, and Harm and Mac go to Baghdad to help with the court-martial.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac and Turner investigate the Naval Academy's sailing instructor for dereliction of duty after a midshipman drowns during a training exercise.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret and Todd team up to help a man who has been declared legally dead, even though he is very much alive.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to have been living under an alias created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases from 20 years ago.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop an influx of drugs that are being smuggled into the country via drones; an ultimatum is issued.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Ryan is kidnapped, he is forced to betray Horatio and the team.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When a government official is killed during a routine patrol, a sergeant stands accused of involuntary manslaughter, and Harm and Mac go to Baghdad to help with the court-martial.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac and Turner investigate the Naval Academy's sailing instructor for dereliction of duty after a midshipman drowns during a training exercise.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Ryan is kidnapped, he is forced to betray Horatio and the team.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop an influx of drugs that are being smuggled into the country via drones; an ultimatum is issued.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret and Todd team up to help a man who has been declared legally dead, even though he is very much alive.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A decomposed body found in a tub of acid at a naval base leads Gibbs to deduce that an impostor is serving aboard one of the nuclear submarines.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Ryan is kidnapped, he is forced to betray Horatio and the team.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop an influx of drugs that are being smuggled into the country via drones; an ultimatum is issued.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When a government official is killed during a routine patrol, a sergeant stands accused of involuntary manslaughter, and Harm and Mac go to Baghdad to help with the court-martial.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac and Turner investigate the Naval Academy's sailing instructor for dereliction of duty after a midshipman drowns during a training exercise.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team investigates a possible terror threat after the chief of logistics for a naval weapons station collapses on the job; Kensi and Deeks research different honeymoon locations.

programme.title: Crime Beat
programme.desc: When Canadian boxing star Eddie "Hurricane" Melo is killed, investigators start digging into his connections to the Montreal Mafia; Mark Carcasole reports on the theories, the arrests and how Melo's daughter is keeping her father's memory alive.

programme.title: Crime Beat
programme.desc: Four men were gunned down in their prime, shot and killed in three separate shootings; investigators would discover that the murders were all connected, and the evidence would lead them to a serial killer hungry for notoriety and fame.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2018, a killer shoots 33-year-old restaurant worker Joshua Webb outside an apartment block in Beckley, W.V.; to solve the murder and identify the culprit, police must unravel a web of lies by following a trail of security footage.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: Ray falls for a woman who saves his life and keeps mysteriously appearing during his investigation of a hit-and-run.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: Fraser goes undercover in a mental institution to investigate a series of strange happenings among the patients.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2013, someone murders 35-year-old assistant manager Larry Wells in his office at Toys R Us; a disguised knife-wielding man appears on camera stalking the store; police must now follow the trail of surveillance footage to track down the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2018, a killer shoots 33-year-old restaurant worker Joshua Webb outside an apartment block in Beckley, W.V.; to solve the murder and identify the culprit, police must unravel a web of lies by following a trail of security footage.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac arrive for the trial of three MPs charged with abusing a prisoner at the Guantánamo Bay prison camp for al-Qaida terrorists.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Coates' once-shady past comes back to haunt her when an old friend comes to stay and frames her for murder.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret helps Susan serve justice for a tennis coach accused of drugging a teen athlete; Todd and Lyle embark on an epic office prank war.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the world of black market art when evidence in a murder case reveals that a rare painting has been swapped for a fake.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Sylvester wins big on "The Price Is Right"; the team must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation that is preparing to ship weapons to South America.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder case leads Horatio to discover that Ron Saris is alive and seeking revenge on Julia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac arrive for the trial of three MPs charged with abusing a prisoner at the Guantánamo Bay prison camp for al-Qaida terrorists.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Coates' once-shady past comes back to haunt her when an old friend comes to stay and frames her for murder.

programme.title: On The Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A teenager waiting for a ride home from work suddenly disappears. When her friends arrive, they find terrifying evidence of her abduction.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Two young men are victims of a hammer attack in Tulsa. Meanwhile, in Atlanta, a man is murdered after a selfless act.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: A wife's death is ruled as a suicide, but investigators sense something sinister. Years later, secrets unravel and a chilling truth is exposed.

programme.title: Manifesto Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: With the discovery of Leonard Lake's cabin, investigators find the hidden cell where Lake kept his victims, as well as his recorded manifesto. (2 of.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: When an actress is found lifeless in bed, no one can figure out what happened. The hunt leads to discover that she was not the killer's first victim.

programme.title: Look What You Made Me Do
programme.desc: When a beloved father of two suddenly disappears, a story of obsession, anger and jealousy begins to unfold. His new girlfriend leads police to her ex.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: My Dexter-Obsessed Stepson Murdered My Wife: Kris Wardle talks about his stepson Mark Howe, whose obsession with TV series Dexter led him to brutally murder his own mother.

programme.title: The Real Murders Of Atlanta
programme.desc: When a beloved suburban Atlanta police officer is found shot execution-style in her bed, investigators must probe her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: While investigating the death of a mother, police are called to an apparent hit-and-run. But this victim's true cause of death turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When Michael Rainsford was fatally shot through his kitchen window in 2022, the significance of digital evidence in contemporary crime-solving became clear.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When Sydney Loofe entered the world of online dating, she unknowingly crossed paths with the people who would end her life.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: A wife's death is ruled as a suicide, but investigators sense something sinister. Years later, secrets unravel and a chilling truth is exposed.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Mobile, Alabama, when a quick money scam ends in a double murder, a rookie homicide detective takes it personally.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: While working on a grisly case, Lt Joe Kenda finds a connection between the slain pilot and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: After an explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, Lt Joe Kenda must identify a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Fugitive Hunters: Mexico
programme.desc: Fugitive Hunters track a California man hiding in a quiet Mexican town and a young drug trafficker with everything at stake.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: Can I Show You My Butt?: A senior citizen wields an unusual weapon - her mouth - while a suspected criminal uses a local police station as a drive thru.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Dan Abrams hosts as series two walks you through the most dramatic outbursts and extraordinary moments to ever take place in US courtrooms.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: 51-year-old Lee Pomeroy falls victim to a knife attack on a commuter train to London, being brutally stabbed in a vicious, unprovoked attack.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: A 23-year-old woman is found murdered in Florida. Detectives uncover jealousy and obsession as a love rival becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Spring Break Murders
programme.desc: In June 2009, 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel sneaks off to Myrtle Beach for spring break but goes missing two days later.

programme.title: Spring Break Murders
programme.desc: Follow the clues as a 15-year-old vanishes days before spring break and a single photo leads investigators to four key suspects.

programme.title: Spring Break Murders
programme.desc: In May 2001, music student Kate planned to spend her break working as a dorm manager, but not long after she started, she was found murdered.

programme.title: On The Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police are tasked with unravelling a puzzling mystery after a beloved father and real estate executive is ambushed in his office.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Mobile, Alabama, when a quick money scam ends in a double murder, a rookie homicide detective takes it personally.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: A 23-year-old woman is found murdered in Florida. Detectives uncover jealousy and obsession as a love rival becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: Caught in a Web of Lies: When a predator targets a mum, Det. Godwin teams with the FBI to stop his plan. Then, a sex offender's online activity raises alarms.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Alaska State Troopers pursue gas thieves, use pepper balls to arrest a barricaded suspect and respond to shots fired in a remote village.

programme.title: K9 Pd With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 units face high-stakes moments: Scout charges an armed suspect, Vlad confronts a defiant driver, Edge tracks thieves at night and ZAM searches for evidence.

programme.title: K9 Pd With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Bodycam and dashcam footage follows K9 units tracking fugitives. Pandora finds a missing person, Jet and Cheney take down a fugitive and Karma stops a suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: Playing a cat-and-mouse game, police hunt for the heartless killer of a student.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Wisconsin, a K-9 saves officers' lives by taking down an armed fugitive but gets shot in the head; in Connecticut, a patrolman comes under fire during a store robbery; in Oklahoma, a head-on collision with a deputy leads to a full-scale manhunt.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: A shoplifter fires at a police officer and takes him down in Virginia; in New Mexico, deputies pursue armed robbers.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Vermont, a dad wielding an excavator attacks officers to stop them from arresting his son; in Wisconsin, a police pastor on a ride-along gets caught up in a high-speed chase; in an Indiana motel, a wanted man opens fire on police.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In New Mexico, an inmate faking a heart attack jumps a prison guard; the suspect escapes in the van, taking two fellow inmates with him and sparking a manhunt; in Nebraska, a family enjoying their July 4th faces a firework attack by a random family.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In N.M., a carjacker shoots an officer before going on the run, leading officers into a confrontation; in Okla., police respond to a domestic violence call to find an empty house.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Oceanside police pursue a violent suspect following a domestic shooting; officers also intercept a reckless driver headed toward 10k runners; they rescue residents from a building fire.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: A suspect sets fire to his home, and officers battle deadly floods.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Maryland, a high-speed chase erupts when a serial dangerous driver strikes again, putting one officer's life in grave danger. In Georgia, police hunt a bank robber, and in Wisconsin, a gunfight breaks out when a lone officer confronts an armed man.

programme.title: 911: Did the Killer Call
programme.desc: Three horrific murders. Three different 911 calls. All three callers claim they're innocent - but for the police, the call can reveal so much more than just the facts of the case. Find out which of them is the real killer in disguise.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When 37-year-old Merrilee Cox-Lafferty disappears in Utah, investigators turn to CCTV to track her down; when her car turns up 300 miles away in Idaho, new persons of interest enter the frame, and Merrilee's disappearance is something more sinister.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Maryland, a high-speed chase erupts when a serial dangerous driver strikes again, putting one officer's life in grave danger. In Georgia, police hunt a bank robber, and in Wisconsin, a gunfight breaks out when a lone officer confronts an armed man.

programme.title: 911: Did the Killer Call
programme.desc: Three horrific murders. Three different 911 calls. All three callers claim they're innocent - but for the police, the call can reveal so much more than just the facts of the case. Find out which of them is the real killer in disguise.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When 37-year-old Merrilee Cox-Lafferty disappears in Utah, investigators turn to CCTV to track her down; when her car turns up 300 miles away in Idaho, new persons of interest enter the frame, and Merrilee's disappearance is something more sinister.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: A suspect sets fire to his home, and officers battle deadly floods.

programme.title: Calls From the Inside
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in front of her boyfriend's home in Michigan, all evidence seems to point to the boyfriend, but detectives uncover more suspects.

programme.title: Calls From the Inside
programme.desc: Two middle class moms both tried to kill their husbands; jail calls between the two reveal their thoughts on love, men, and what landed them in prison.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: Police retrace the final steps of single mother Mary Stetson after her torso washes up on the shore of New Hampshire's Piscataquog River.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: Former beauty queen Jackie Johns' body is found floating in Missouri's Lake Springfield, and as officers pore over Johns' list of admirers, they soon discover the fine line between love and hate.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: Jody Lynn Wolfe's body washes up on the banks of Dry Creek Canal in Fresno, Calif., and detectives learn more about the young teenager's life during the course of their investigation and realize her murder hits close to home.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Forty-two-year-old Miami mother Raquel Calderin vanishes without a trace on her way home from work in 2012; the investigation into disappearance leads detectives deep into a disturbing family picture, and the truth will haunt them for years to come.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Atlanta preschool teacher Julie Love goes missing just a week after getting engaged to boyfriend Mark; detectives find numerous suspects in the teacher's disappearance, but the truth turns out to be far worse than they could have imagined.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Pro football player Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: After 39-year-old Dawn Viens goes missing, her chef husband, David, reports she ran away to escape her problems; the investigation leads detectives to an unexpected killer who disposed of Viens' body in an unimaginable way.

programme.title: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Three hostages, two shoot-outs and one murder take place in a Bakersfield, Calif., cabin community; Benjamin Peter Ashley, an unpredictable and violent outdoorsman, leads investigators down his path of devastation, resulting in an 18-day manhunt.

programme.title: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a mountain community when a beloved resident, 71-year-old Jack Irwin, disappears without a trace; strange crimes and a compelling wiretap operation plague the old cabin where Jack used to live.

programme.title: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: When a cosmetology student goes missing from Dubuque, Iowa, detectives question if her disappearance connects to the murder of a woman found nearby; suspicion surrounds a remote cabin on Stumpf Island.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: After a woman tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover; as the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: When a young mother plummets into depression, she turns to the internet for comfort, discovering a virtual world of fetishes, fantasies and dark intentions.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance; however, her boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow; tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: When a computer wizard fails to make the grade as a professional video gamer, he becomes obsessed with achieving internet fame; what starts as an online prank spirals into a new and deadly crime called swatting that chills the nation.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Kingdom of Kush to dive the flooded pyramid tomb of a king; the murky water provides zero visibility, and the pyramid is at risk of collapse; the dive could unlock the mystery of a civilization that once conquered Egypt.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh looks to finally crack the D. B. Cooper case, America's only unsolved skyjacking; a deathbed confession and cutting-edge forensics have Josh hot on the trail of the $200,000 ransom that's never been recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious collapse of Egypt's old kingdom, Josh completes his Saqqara necropolis dig. Opening several tombs, Josh finds treasure, clues and haunting remains. Testing results may prove they've discovered Egypt's oldest royal mummy.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh searches for a top-secret WWII seaplane that crashed into the Pacific; now, 70 years later, Josh joins a team scouring the ocean floor hundreds of feet below to find a lost aviation treasure -- the only XP5Y-1 still in existence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates chases the lost fortune of Prohibition's infamous bootlegger Dutch Schultz; Josh dives the murky shore near Dutch's lavish New York mansion and searches the underground bunker that housed his secret distillery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Tackling the most famous prison break of all time, Josh retraces the 1962 Alcatraz escape; new leads take Josh from San Francisco to the jungles of Brazil, where he finds witnesses and evidence that rewrite the FBI's version of the story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh enters the Laos jungle to locate a lost culture's burial jars; first, he detonates unexploded Vietnam War ordnance to clear a safe path; at the site, he uses 3D scanning and facial recognition tech to analyze the remains, providing new data to understand this mysterious civilization.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch
programme.desc: The team drills into volatile ground above the Golden Staircase as outsiders get close; after blasting through a massive boulder, they break into a hidden tunnel and rappel down to explore.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind sonar survey reveals a submerged pirate lair located off the coast of Jamaica. Using groundbreaking photogrammetry, Josh dives in to hunt for the $50M stolen treasure of Black Bart, the King of Pirates.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch
programme.desc: As winter looms over Blind Frog Ranch, the team rappels into a cavern but gets lost in a maze of tunnels. After uncovering a stone formation believed to be the Golden Staircase, Alex dives into a flooded cave chasing a cache of Aztec gold.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh enters the Laos jungle to locate a lost culture's burial jars; first, he detonates unexploded Vietnam War ordnance to clear a safe path; at the site, he uses 3D scanning and facial recognition tech to analyze the remains, providing new data to understand this mysterious civilization.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind sonar survey reveals a submerged pirate lair located off the coast of Jamaica. Using groundbreaking photogrammetry, Josh dives in to hunt for the $50M stolen treasure of Black Bart, the King of Pirates.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch
programme.desc: As winter looms over Blind Frog Ranch, the team rappels into a cavern but gets lost in a maze of tunnels. After uncovering a stone formation believed to be the Golden Staircase, Alex dives into a flooded cave chasing a cache of Aztec gold.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch
programme.desc: The team drills into volatile ground above the Golden Staircase as outsiders get close; after blasting through a massive boulder, they break into a hidden tunnel and rappel down to explore.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Kingdom of Kush to dive the flooded pyramid tomb of a king; the murky water provides zero visibility, and the pyramid is at risk of collapse; the dive could unlock the mystery of a civilization that once conquered Egypt.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh looks to finally crack the D. B. Cooper case, America's only unsolved skyjacking; a deathbed confession and cutting-edge forensics have Josh hot on the trail of the $200,000 ransom that's never been recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind sonar survey reveals a submerged pirate lair located off the coast of Jamaica. Using groundbreaking photogrammetry, Josh dives in to hunt for the $50M stolen treasure of Black Bart, the King of Pirates.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A muscle-car enthusiast goes to elaborate lengths to fake his own death and collect his own life insurance.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy woman serves her husband a kale smoothie laced with sedatives, then she bludgeons him to death, rolls his body up in a rug and sends it to her storage unit.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A quiet, average teenager with a sinister interest in the occult brutally murders his elderly neighbor in a ritualistic attempt to become a vampire and attain immortality.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: Unwilling to give up his playboy lifestyle, a man strangles his wife to death and uses an air conditioner to fudge the time of her death.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A muscle-car enthusiast goes to elaborate lengths to fake his own death and collect his own life insurance.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy woman serves her husband a kale smoothie laced with sedatives, then she bludgeons him to death, rolls his body up in a rug and sends it to her storage unit.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A quiet, average teenager with a sinister interest in the occult brutally murders his elderly neighbor in a ritualistic attempt to become a vampire and attain immortality.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: Unwilling to give up his playboy lifestyle, a man strangles his wife to death and uses an air conditioner to fudge the time of her death.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A muscle-car enthusiast goes to elaborate lengths to fake his own death and collect his own life insurance.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy woman serves her husband a kale smoothie laced with sedatives, then she bludgeons him to death, rolls his body up in a rug and sends it to her storage unit.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A quiet, average teenager with a sinister interest in the occult brutally murders his elderly neighbor in a ritualistic attempt to become a vampire and attain immortality.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: Unwilling to give up his playboy lifestyle, a man strangles his wife to death and uses an air conditioner to fudge the time of her death.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: In the fleet's last push for gold, Reaper Nation fights to mine until the cold, bitter end; Shawn reaches for gold in deeper waters; Emily must depend on her last remaining diver; Chris and Zeke debate whether to mine in murky conditions.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: In the critical final days, Kris stays laser-focused on his mission while brother Andy struggles aboard the All-In; Shawn chases a disappearing hot spot; Vernon returns to deep and dangerous waters.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: Chris McCully continues to pose a serious threat to Mr. Gold; Vernon and crew are plagued by mishaps; the Kellys wait for a game-changing piece of gold mining equipment to arrive; Shawn competes in Nome's biggest snowmobile race.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: Shawn and Zeke each risk dangerous ice missions in hopes of big paystreaks; Kris' gold mining miracle has arrived but requires some assembly; Jane does her best with an absent Emily and a diver who can't swim.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: Innovative mining strategies pay off for Chris and Shawn. A crew screwup leaves Kris once again behind in the gold count. A shocking discovery reveals why Emily's crew hasn't been seeing any gold in the box.

programme.title: Surviving Jaws
programme.desc: Fifty years after "Jaws" terrified beachgoers, marine biologist Tom "Blowfish" Hurd and ecologist Michelle Jewell dive with great whites to separate fact from fiction, like whether skinny-dipping is risky or if a shark could chew through a boat.

programme.title: Frankenshark
programme.desc: Shark expert Tristan Guttridge and his mad scientist team use CGI to build the ultimate "Frankenshark"; pulling from a variety of shark species, they build the deadliest, weirdest shark on the planet.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That?
programme.desc: Diving into retrofits on the world's only underwater habitat, where NASA astronauts train for space missions; Mike joins a crack repair team who breathe new life into this oceanic environment after a global pandemic shut it down.

programme.title: WWII: Rise of the Tank
programme.desc: Investigating how early concepts of armoured fighting vehicles influenced the creation of the very first tank prototype; seeing how the muddy battlefields of WW I became a crucial testing ground for a machine that would soon change military history.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: A look at key naval battles that have taken place in the Persian Gulf over the last 50 years and the warships involved, from both sides of the conflicts.

programme.title: Rise of Dictators
programme.desc: Uncover the sinister ways that dictators convince their followers to worship them as heroes; watch how they weave mythical narratives around their abilities, selling themselves as saviors who should hold absolute power over the people.

programme.title: WWII: Rise of the Tank
programme.desc: Investigating how early concepts of armoured fighting vehicles influenced the creation of the very first tank prototype; seeing how the muddy battlefields of WW I became a crucial testing ground for a machine that would soon change military history.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: A look at key naval battles that have taken place in the Persian Gulf over the last 50 years and the warships involved, from both sides of the conflicts.

programme.title: Rise of Dictators
programme.desc: Uncover the sinister ways that dictators convince their followers to worship them as heroes; watch how they weave mythical narratives around their abilities, selling themselves as saviors who should hold absolute power over the people.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: Visiting Australia's One Central Park, the Oslo Opera House and the California Academy of Sciences in San Francisco to reveal their architectural secrets.

programme.title: Inside Pyramids
programme.desc: Investigate one of Egypt's oldest monuments to eternity: the Buried Pyramid of Sekhemkhet; explore a well-preserved underground tomb and view a mysterious sarcophagus during the first-ever on-camera exploration of this 4,500-year-old sacred place.

programme.title: The Pharaohs: Greater than the Pyramids
programme.desc: Part 6/6. Unearth the dramatic final days of the Twentieth Dynasty's great warrior king, Ramses III; view a rare judicial papyrus that recounts the story of an assassination plot hatched in the royal harem; see what the monarch's mummy reveals today.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: Visiting Australia's One Central Park, the Oslo Opera House and the California Academy of Sciences in San Francisco to reveal their architectural secrets.

programme.title: Inside Pyramids
programme.desc: Investigate one of Egypt's oldest monuments to eternity: the Buried Pyramid of Sekhemkhet; explore a well-preserved underground tomb and view a mysterious sarcophagus during the first-ever on-camera exploration of this 4,500-year-old sacred place.

programme.title: The Pharaohs: Greater than the Pyramids
programme.desc: Part 6/6. Unearth the dramatic final days of the Twentieth Dynasty's great warrior king, Ramses III; view a rare judicial papyrus that recounts the story of an assassination plot hatched in the royal harem; see what the monarch's mummy reveals today.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: Visiting Australia's One Central Park, the Oslo Opera House and the California Academy of Sciences in San Francisco to reveal their architectural secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Dive into the historical and natural secrets of the deep; explore an uninhabited concrete island, ocean spirals off the Australian coast, underwater evidence of a violent past and tracks thousands of metres below the sea's surface.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Salvage
programme.desc: In rough water, salvors scramble to retrieve a cruise ship's anchor lost at sea; teams hope to salvage cherished floating homes damaged by hurricane Sandy.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic River Journeys
programme.desc: Rumoured to be the cleanest river in Europe, few dispute it's the coldest; cascading down from the Dinaric Alps in Serbia, it soon crosses the border into Bosnia-Herzegovina, where marine biologist and fisherman Sanel Riđanović casts for salmon.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic River Journeys
programme.desc: Tackling the grade 6 rapids and untamed waters of the Buller River on the west coast of New Zealand's South Island, blessed by a Māori elder of the Ngāti Apa ki te Rā Tō.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Traipsing along ancient pathways crisscrossing Easter Island; finding gigantic designs carved into Asia's Eastern Steppe; ascending a tall pyramid rising from Antarctica's icy landscape.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Salvage
programme.desc: Crews work around the clock to build the world's largest underwater concrete bed to salvage the Costa Concordia; operating in secrecy, teams work under high security to repair one of the world's most iconic cruise liners.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic River Journeys
programme.desc: Tackling the grade 6 rapids and untamed waters of the Buller River on the west coast of New Zealand's South Island, blessed by a Māori elder of the Ngāti Apa ki te Rā Tō.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Traipsing along ancient pathways crisscrossing Easter Island; finding gigantic designs carved into Asia's Eastern Steppe; ascending a tall pyramid rising from Antarctica's icy landscape.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Salvage
programme.desc: Crews work around the clock to build the world's largest underwater concrete bed to salvage the Costa Concordia; operating in secrecy, teams work under high security to repair one of the world's most iconic cruise liners.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: Traveling from Canada to Belgium to the Southern U.S. to examine an eye-popping school, museum and railway station and reveal how they were built.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That?
programme.desc: Mike joins the U.S. Marines' Heavy Haulers helicopter squadron and gets inside their battle to keep a fleet of souped-up Sikorsky CH-53E Super Stallion choppers flying as they prepare for intense war games in the desert and mountains.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: Visiting Australia's One Central Park, the Oslo Opera House and the California Academy of Sciences in San Francisco to reveal their architectural secrets.

programme.title: Inside Pyramids
programme.desc: Investigate one of Egypt's oldest monuments to eternity: the Buried Pyramid of Sekhemkhet; explore a well-preserved underground tomb and view a mysterious sarcophagus during the first-ever on-camera exploration of this 4,500-year-old sacred place.

programme.title: The Pharaohs: Greater than the Pyramids
programme.desc: Part 6/6. Unearth the dramatic final days of the Twentieth Dynasty's great warrior king, Ramses III; view a rare judicial papyrus that recounts the story of an assassination plot hatched in the royal harem; see what the monarch's mummy reveals today.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: Visiting Australia's One Central Park, the Oslo Opera House and the California Academy of Sciences in San Francisco to reveal their architectural secrets.

programme.title: Inside Pyramids
programme.desc: Investigate one of Egypt's oldest monuments to eternity: the Buried Pyramid of Sekhemkhet; explore a well-preserved underground tomb and view a mysterious sarcophagus during the first-ever on-camera exploration of this 4,500-year-old sacred place.

programme.title: The Pharaohs: Greater than the Pyramids
programme.desc: Part 6/6. Unearth the dramatic final days of the Twentieth Dynasty's great warrior king, Ramses III; view a rare judicial papyrus that recounts the story of an assassination plot hatched in the royal harem; see what the monarch's mummy reveals today.

programme.title: Scanning History
programme.desc: Deploy futuristic lidar technology to map the Amber Road, an ancient trade network linking the Baltic Sea to the Mediterranean. Follow researchers as they retrace the route and reshape our understanding of historical trade and cultural exchange.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: William and Lisa are ready to move out of their family's place and into their own home in New York, but she's admittedly picky, especially when it comes to renovating.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An Ohio couple looks for a bigger home to accommodate their work and leisure needs; he wants a Craftsman with a man cave he can escape to, but she wants a Victorian that has the space she needs for her growing business.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A married couple brings a contractor friend on the search for a vacation home in the Florida Keys; he wants a move-in-ready historical bungalow with a pool and a Hemingway Room, while she wants a complete fixer-upper with water views.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds hunt for a new home back in their home state of Delaware; she wants a colorful Victorian that's fun and welcoming to family, while he would rather have a simple ranch in the country.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After marrying on Daufuskie Island, a family of eleven wants to find a place where it can visit, relax and enjoy the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A couple looks for a family vacation home in the "Sunrise City" of Fort Pierce, Fla., where they can spend time together.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Shane and Justin want to be closer to the water; they hope to move to Palacios, Texas and find a beachfront property with a modest budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A family wants to find a beach getaway in Sargent, Texas, but they cannot decide between fishing or the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A St. Thomas native is ready to move back to the island after spending years renting in the Charlotte Amalie area; she wants to find a home in the hills.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A busy couple from Chicago visits the U.S. Virgin Island of St. Croix and find its tranquil vibes pleasing.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Mark and Josephine fell in love with Kailua-Kona, Hawaii after their engagement, and for Josephine, it reminds her of growing up in the Philippines.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After renting vacation homes for years, a couple has decided to buy a place of their own, where they can spend time with their children on the water.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: Four of America's top Pitmasters face off against the trifecta of fowl; there's $5000 at stake and an invitation into the finale for the largest prize in BBQ; $100,000 and the Kingsford Cup.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: One Pitmaster is headed into an ambulance; the rest compete to be invited into the finale.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: The challenge, brisket; tempers flare while the pits are low and slow.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: Whole hog on old-fashioned cinder block pits; someone will take home the money and be named BBQ Pitmaster Grand Champion.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: Three Pitmasters compete at the Don't Be Cruel BBQ in Mississippi to see who has the best beef brisket and tri-tip; the Pitmasters' low-slow cooking skills are tested.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: One Pitmaster is headed into an ambulance; the rest compete to be invited into the finale.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: The challenge, brisket; tempers flare while the pits are low and slow.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: Whole hog on old-fashioned cinder block pits; someone will take home the money and be named BBQ Pitmaster Grand Champion.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: Three Pitmasters compete at the Don't Be Cruel BBQ in Mississippi to see who has the best beef brisket and tri-tip; the Pitmasters' low-slow cooking skills are tested.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A St. Thomas native is ready to move back to the island after spending years renting in the Charlotte Amalie area; she wants to find a home in the hills.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A busy couple from Chicago visits the U.S. Virgin Island of St. Croix and find its tranquil vibes pleasing.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Mark and Josephine fell in love with Kailua-Kona, Hawaii after their engagement, and for Josephine, it reminds her of growing up in the Philippines.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After renting vacation homes for years, a couple has decided to buy a place of their own, where they can spend time with their children on the water.

programme.title: Island Hunters
programme.desc: Toronto natives want to elope in Belize, so they search for an island resort that can accommodate both the wedding and the honeymoon.

programme.title: Island Hunters
programme.desc: A recently retired music producer wants to spend his golden years on his own private island in the Charleston Bay.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah visits the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada for Her Majesty's Feast, meat pie poutine, the Dirtburger and Maddy Moo's Wrap Attack; the Washington County Fair in New York for Sugar Shack cotton candy, Bleu Ribbon Fries and the Twisted S'More.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah visits the annual Rio Rancho Pork & Brew festival in New Mexico, where he samples a trio of meaty meals before devouring adorable Baby Cakes; Noah visits the Ionia Free Fair in Michigan, where he enjoys The Tater Grenade and Churro S'mores.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The Austrian alpine dawg, a cheese-stuffed bratwurst in a hearty roll, topped with sauerkraut and potato salad; Swiss lava sandwich is a combo of melted cheese, cured ham, gherkins and mustard; chili cheese dog pizza.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tackles the scooper bowl sundae at the Riverside County Fair and Date Festival in Indio, Calif.; he visits the Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo for the on-Pho-gettable burger and dines on royal treats at the Medieval Fair of Norman, Okla.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together; the Elephant Ear Taco is a new take on a fairground favorite; and the Peanut Pop Shake has Noah all shook up.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: A traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients; trying the Great Pacific Pita and the Deep Fried Chili Dog; eating the Marionberry Volcano; visiting the El Dorado County Fair in Placerville, Calif.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah samples the menu at the Three Rivers Festival in Fort Wayne, Ind., from an enchilada funnel cake to bacon barbecue corn; Noah hits the Orange County Fair in Costa Mesa, Calif. Where he samples Drunken Pickle Pops and the Pineapple Unicorn Bomb.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Texas Renaissance Festival; Sir Francis fry dog and the crown jewel; Plant City, Florida; berry delicious carnival treats at the Florida Strawberry Festival; strawberries make a surprise appearance in savory treats like the sweet brisket taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah visits the York Fair in Pennsylvania; savors the Taste of Christmas; Burger Bomb Pretzel; fork-free Chick'n'Waffle; apple pie funnel cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah visits the Delaware State Fair and tries the Delaware Dog, the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco, along with the Killer Cereal Treat; Noah's second stop is the Obion County Fair in Union City, Tenn.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple decides to move to McKinney, Texas, to be closer to her family; he's looking for a contemporary home with clean lines and space for an office, but she's got her heart set on a homey Craftsman with room to grow their family.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An architecture enthusiast is looking for vintage charm in a quiet neighborhood of Chicago, but her opinionated cousin wants her to live in an open-concept city high rise; it's up to her to decide if she takes the advice or goes with her gut.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looks to move away from the sometimes loud and busy bars in Kansas City; she's a historian and loves the older Craftsman homes that are common to the area, but he's computer scientist and seeks something modern with smart home automation.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newly single mom searches for a home to share with her teenage son in Ithaca, N.Y.; her standards may be higher than her budget, however, so she'll need a good friend to keep her from getting distracted.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Dallas couple with a big family seeks a home that can accommodate them all; while she focuses on over-the-top amenities and a huge dining room for the holidays, he's more focused on a house that looks like a castle with a shower fit for a king.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An engaged couple in Austin, Texas, looks for a first home; he wants to be close to downtown in a modern condo with an entertainment room, while she wants a suburban Craftsman with a craft room.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After years of moving around, a young family is happy to put down roots in Stephenville, Texas: She wants a home with character and doesn't mind projects, while he wants a new house that's move-in ready.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A married couple look to downsize and find a smaller home in Loudon, Tenn.; they're looking for a single family home on one level that's move-in ready, but with a strict budget and a lot of demands, finding the right place will be difficult.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After years of renting, Lauren and Tate are ready to move on and seek a place in Port Aransas, Texas; however, they are at odds with the condition of their future home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Phillip and Jordan love visiting Cape Charles, Va. with their three young sons, and want to take advantage of the small beach town feel and historic charm.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After renting, a couple want to find a home in Alligator Point, Fla., where they can live steps away from the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A woman wants to use her college fund for a beach property on South Padre Island, Texas, since she received a full scholarship.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A family wants to find a beachfront home and investment property in New Smyrna Beach, Fla., where they have spent a lot of time.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Bill is a high school teacher and coach from Camarillo, Calif., And has been renting in Maui for over six years, but has finally saved enough to purchase a place of his own.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Design duo Cherise and Kim against creative craftsmen Joe and Andrew.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Boisterous brothers take on sassy sisters.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Mom and dad battle with their two daughters.

programme.title: Australia's Hidden Islands
programme.desc: A look at Christmas Island, which is hundreds of miles north-west of Australia's mainland and rises out of the Indian Ocean, providing the stage for extraordinary migrations.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The police are called when neglected marmosets are discovered in poor conditions, and capuchin leader Gorilon is checked over after a fight to see if he needs surgery.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Jeremy's patience is tested by Bryan the chimp's emotional outbursts, and capuchin Marlow catches a trespasser. Marmoset James hopes to be rescued from a pet shop full of predators.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Lizzie Daly takes an in-depth look at the unique and diverse marine life that lives in and around Australia, beginning in the shores of the Northern Territory and the abundant waters of the Great Barrier Reef, facing flooded roads, hungry saltwater crocs ad killer jellyfish.

programme.title: Tales from Zambia
programme.desc: After losing half her trunk in a snare, elephant Chilema must find new ways to eat, drink and bathe. When the dry season comes, life gets even tougher.

programme.title: Australia's Hidden Islands
programme.desc: A look at Christmas Island, which is hundreds of miles north-west of Australia's mainland and rises out of the Indian Ocean, providing the stage for extraordinary migrations.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: Tracing dazzling waterways all over the world, from volcanic rivers in Russia's far east to geothermal streams in Florida.

programme.title: Land of Primates
programme.desc: The South African village of Hogsback is home to samango monkeys and the cape parrots, two intelligent primates facing difficult situations.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Just as Hope is scrambling to get ready for her busiest day of the year, the government decides to seize the bear cub she has worked so hard to save.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Lizzie Daly takes an in-depth look at the unique and diverse marine life that lives in and around Australia, beginning in the shores of the Northern Territory and the abundant waters of the Great Barrier Reef, facing flooded roads, hungry saltwater crocs ad killer jellyfish.

programme.title: Tales from Zambia
programme.desc: After losing half her trunk in a snare, elephant Chilema must find new ways to eat, drink and bathe. When the dry season comes, life gets even tougher.

programme.title: Coastal Africa
programme.desc: The distinctive landscape of Agulhas on Africa's east coast, which is made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colourful coral reefs.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The world-famous Maldives face an uncertain future, as rising sea levels threaten to wipe out this tiny island nation. This documentary asks what can be done.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: When a category two hurricane slams straight into the rehab, Hope and her team struggle to protect their patients in the middle of the raging storm.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team heads to Vietnam to release rare pygmy lorises into the wild, and golden-cheeked gibbon Da returns to the forest.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The park-keepers check up on pygmy lorises Son, Sylvia and Talai to find out how they are coping in the wild in Vietnam. Alison meets baby Lala for the first time.

programme.title: Coastal Africa
programme.desc: The story of the Golden Forest, vast expanses of vital kelp that lines Africa's southwestern shore, and feed four distinct worlds.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Pacific coast of Costa Rica hosts nearly 5,000 species of marine life. But in this undersea jungle, the apex predator sharks are at risk.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Heading to America's far north for a look at its waterways' fighters, as a spring thaw pits eagles against herons and dragonfly nymphs against venomous water bugs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: A journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives and transforms, while witnessing the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle and walking tall with flamingos.

programme.title: Australia's Hidden Islands
programme.desc: A look at Fraser Island, which is host a huge variety of wildlife on its unforgiving terrain, including dingos, wallabies and sea eagles.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team heads to Vietnam to release rare pygmy lorises into the wild, and golden-cheeked gibbon Da returns to the forest.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The park-keepers check up on pygmy lorises Son, Sylvia and Talai to find out how they are coping in the wild in Vietnam. Alison meets baby Lala for the first time.

programme.title: Coastal Africa
programme.desc: The story of the Golden Forest, vast expanses of vital kelp that lines Africa's southwestern shore, and feed four distinct worlds.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Pacific coast of Costa Rica hosts nearly 5,000 species of marine life. But in this undersea jungle, the apex predator sharks are at risk.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Heading to America's far north for a look at its waterways' fighters, as a spring thaw pits eagles against herons and dragonfly nymphs against venomous water bugs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: A journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives and transforms, while witnessing the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle and walking tall with flamingos.

programme.title: Australia's Hidden Islands
programme.desc: A look at Fraser Island, which is host a huge variety of wildlife on its unforgiving terrain, including dingos, wallabies and sea eagles.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team heads to Vietnam to release rare pygmy lorises into the wild, and golden-cheeked gibbon Da returns to the forest.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The park-keepers check up on pygmy lorises Son, Sylvia and Talai to find out how they are coping in the wild in Vietnam. Alison meets baby Lala for the first time.

programme.title: Superbeast
programme.desc: A celebration of nature's ultimate athletes as they survive, excel and dominate in Earth's toughest arenas, from apex predators to cunning creatures.

programme.title: Wild Science
programme.desc: Following the caiman's journey from the age of dinosaurs to the modern day, where strange symbiosis and fierce maternal instincts shape its survival.

programme.title: Australia's Hidden Islands
programme.desc: A look at Fraser Island, which is host a huge variety of wildlife on its unforgiving terrain, including dingos, wallabies and sea eagles.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: A journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives and transforms, while witnessing the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle and walking tall with flamingos.

programme.title: Land of Primates
programme.desc: Cameras follow the Bambelela Troop, a successful troop of chacma baboons that live in a pristine South African valley. But now they are not the only baboons around.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: Vern helps a father-daughter duo transform a one-room schoolhouse into a first home with old-world design.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: A woman all by herself in a new city takes on the challenge of turning an abandoned, old church into her new home.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: Host and designer Vern Yip travels across the country to mentor brave renovators who have taken.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley transform a property; they make the upstairs a kids play zone and the downstairs an elegant retreat.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley purchase the worst house in Galveston Island's desirable East End Historic District; it has a decaying porch and extensive water damage, they have their work cut out for them to make a profit on the project.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays tackle one of their most expensive projects ever in a town they both love; close to the beach and parade routes, the brick home exudes class, functionality and becomes one of Michael's favorite projects.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take a gamble on a 1979 property as old homes become harder to find in a saturated market—with fewer historical details to honor, they must get creative with their designs.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Ryan picks up a rundown tiny cabin for a rock-bottom price that the crew decides to transform into a customizable, one-of-a-kind retreat that they can auction off for charity.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: This family's camp is cozy and complete on the inside, but the outside is a mess.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a project to restore a lakeside cabin once shared by a homeowner and her late husband, who died shortly after they bought it; she hopes for major updates, like a new roof, fresh stain, an expanded living room and a quiet lookout spot.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team transforms the original Monmouth fire station into a fire museum; with safety as their top priority, they deal with a messy demo, reinforce an unstable second floor with hefty steel beams and honor local heroes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: This family's camp is cozy and complete on the inside, but the outside is a mess.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a project to restore a lakeside cabin once shared by a homeowner and her late husband, who died shortly after they bought it; she hopes for major updates, like a new roof, fresh stain, an expanded living room and a quiet lookout spot.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team transforms the original Monmouth fire station into a fire museum; with safety as their top priority, they deal with a messy demo, reinforce an unstable second floor with hefty steel beams and honor local heroes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Ryan picks up a rundown tiny cabin for a rock-bottom price that the crew decides to transform into a customizable, one-of-a-kind retreat that they can auction off for charity.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark Bowe recalls places where the guys have taken in local history over the years; they visit Colorado's Canyons of the Ancients, explore how pioneers built cabins with shorter trees in Texas, and Mark sees a Virginia church built by his ancestor.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Honoring the craftsmanship of the American pioneer is at the heart of every job, so Mark Bowe revisits some of the most talented artisans the guys have ever met, including woodworkers, blacksmiths, leather makers, glassblowers and more.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders access the beautiful back lot of the Boneyard facing a state park to create a picture-perfect cabin; working with custom notched inventory, the guys design a two-story log cabin ahead of their client's arrival.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple yearns to return to the beaches of Tampa Bay and wants to find a property that won't break the bank; they're ready to put in the work, but they must find a balance between renovating while living in the home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple is searching for a family beach house along the shores of Brigantine, N.J.; they're hoping to find a home with lots of space both inside and out, but also a property that has the potential to generate rental income.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A married couple living in Washington, D.C., are looking for a weekend getaway in the nautical hotspot of Lusby, Md.; waterfront property is pricey, but they hope to find a deal.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home where they can watch their family grow for generations, however, beach homes on Long Island, N.Y., can run in the millions, so the family is ready to put in the work to keep renovation costs down.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A thrill-seeker and his girlfriend search for a beach house in the New Jersey summer town where he vacationed as a kid; renovation help comes from a contractor he met through his love of extreme sports like skydiving and base jumping.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple looks for a family beach getaway in the Outer Banks along the shores of Avon, N.C.; the family of do-it-yourselfers tackles the home's major projects and repurpose as much as they can to keep renovation costs down.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna team up with Tim Tebow and his foundation to create a wheelchair accessible home for the Copp Family.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Three homes in the Castle Heights neighborhood of Waco, Texas.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: The impending arrival of their baby determines the deadline for the renovation of a couple's ranch style house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple tours three houses in Lorena, Texas, looking for a three-bedroom, two bathroom home, where they are hoping to offer their children a better life.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple searches for a contemporary home in Woodway, Texas.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: An eclectic builder is ready to take on his next challenge of constructing a Greek cottage in the East Tennessee Valley; when turbulent weather turns his build site into a mud pit, he questions whether his vision will ever become a reality.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: After experiencing a devastating tornado, a family wants to build an off-grid retreat overlooking Tennessee's Ocoee River; as amateur builders, they must rely on the help of friends and family, and each other, to reach the finish line.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Fla., to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home; Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.
